description_long: This is a compact, single-story house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are clad in dark gray siding, contrasted by light blue window and door frames. The front entryway features a central door flanked by two symmetrical, conical topiary plants in pots, and a straight walkway leading up to it. There are several rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically around the house, and a large garage door is visible on one side. A telescope on a tripod and a few decorative elements, such as planters and a small fence, are present near the entrance. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with some metal and glass elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, dark gray siding, blue trim, and a central entryway flanked by potted topiaries. Features include a garage door, asymmetrical windows, and a telescope on the walkway.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large blue garage door and a telescope on a tripod near the walkway.
description_view_1: Front view with the main entry door, two potted topiary plants, and the walkway leading up to the entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a row of rectangular windows and several planters along the base of the wall.
description_view_3: Rear view with minimal features, showing a plain wall and a glimpse of the interior through the open roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with blue trim, flanked by two potted topiary plants and accessed by a straight walkway; no porch or overhang.
